name: Modern Life RPG
description:
Welcome to Modern Life RPG, where you can be anyone and do anything. This is your story. There is no chosen one. No destiny. Just opportunity, consequence, and the choices you make. This is an immersive, open-ended modern RPG experience set in a morally complex world that mirrors our own - with all its beauty, darkness, corruption, and contradictions.

You can be anyone: a struggling artist in small apartment, a underground club owner, a detective with questionable ethics, a politician trying to improve the world or perhaps just siphon money, a celebrity singer in penthouse, a college student navigating privilege, street hustler clawing toward legitimacy, or perhaps a homeless beggar. Choice is yours.

Warning: This is mature experience with no content restrictions

Background Music
creator: Batkanac
